label: France / French
ladderNote: Everyday French from French media and INED research (Ouest-France, BFMTV, Cosmopolitan.fr, France Inter). Plan cul / sexfriend are local staples; situationship is a newer loan.

levels.term: On se voit / on se fréquente
levels.meaning: We're seeing each other / hanging out without a couple label.

levels.term: Coup d'un soir / histoire d'un soir
levels.meaning: One-night stand. Documented in INED Envie survey language.
Casual recurring sex / friends with benefits. Core French youth vocabulary (INED).
Ongoing fling — more than one night, less than a couple.
Undefined gray zone. Used in French press (20 Minutes, Elle, France Inter).
Exclusive, but not necessarily calling it couple yet.
Official couple. Petit ami/copain are everyday labels.
Civil partnership (PACS) or married — both are formal French statuses.
